# Dr. Taehyun Lee (이태현 박사)

> Dr. Taehyun Lee is an entrepreneurship scholar, former venture capital partner, and innovation center founder. He bridges over a decade of VC investing, a decade of university teaching, and doctoral research on startup ecosystems.

## Identity
- Full Name: Dr. Taehyun Lee
- Korean Name: 이태현 (이태현 박사, 이태현 교수)
- Title: PhD, Entrepreneurship Professor, Former VC Partner
- Location: New Jersey, USA
- Email: taehyun.dreamer@gmail.com
- Website: https://taehyundreamer.github.io

## Academic Background
- PhD, Technology Entrepreneurship Management — Dongguk University, Seoul
  - Dissertation: "Startup Success Drivers in Regional Ecosystems: Empirical Validation of the Industry-Region Fit Framework"
  - Dataset: 1,600 startups across 4 major U.S. innovation hubs
- Graduate Certificate, Entrepreneurial Leadership — Stanford University (In Progress)
- MBA, Finance & Management Information Systems — Northeastern University, Boston (D'Amore-McKim School of Business)
- BA, Business Administration — Chung-Ang University, Seoul

## Research
- Primary framework: Industry-Region Fit (IRF) Framework
- Research areas: Startup ecosystems, venture performance, entrepreneurship education, institutional support mechanisms, venture capital, regional innovation
- Published in: Journal of Management, Spirituality & Religion (JMSR); Korean Journal of Entrepreneurship; Asia-Pacific Journal of Business Venturing and Entrepreneurship
- Under review at: Technological Forecasting & Social Change (IF: 15.82); Strategic Entrepreneurship Journal (IF: 9.48); Journal of Business Ethics
- Author of 3 academic books on innovation and entrepreneurship (Chung-Ang University Press, 2015)

## Professional Experience
- Partner, Perpetiel Capital Partners (2011-2022): Over a decade investing in AI, media, and digital technology startups with 30%+ portfolio ROI
- Product Marketing Manager, Microsoft APAC Regional Digital Store (2022-2024)
- Assistant Professor & Director, CAU Creative Studio, Chung-Ang University (2014-2017): Founded innovation center, 500+ students/year, partnerships with Microsoft, Google, Oracle
- Visiting/Adjunct Professor, Dongguk University (2017-2024): Technology entrepreneurship, big data, startup strategy
- Executive Producer, Microsoft Korea (2006-2010): Launched JoinsMSN
- Senior Manager, KBS Media (2004-2005)
- Assistant Manager, GM Korea (2003-2004)
- Researcher, Hyundai Motor Company R&D (1995-1997)

## Key Achievements
- Mentored 2,000+ students on venture development
- 20%+ student startup rate at CAU Creative Studio
- Hosted Microsoft Imagine Cup Korea
- Top 10% teaching evaluations consistently
- 30%+ ROI as VC Partner over a decade

## Academic Profiles
- Google Scholar: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=k7ntbX0AAAAJ
- SSRN: https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/cf_dev/AbsByAuth.cfm?per_id=7752901
- ORCID: https://orcid.org/0009-0007-9106-5115
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/taehyun-lee-phd-2604532b/
